description: Discover and transact on the AntSeed P2P AI network from any MCP-compatible agent.
name: io.github.Augustas11/antfeed-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the AntFeed Explorer REST API.
environmentVariables.name: ANTFEED_EXPLORER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Local AntSeed buyer RPC URL. Required only for the transactional `create_session` tool; omit for read-only use.
environmentVariables.name: ANTSEED_BUYER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Defense-in-depth ceiling on `create_session` deposits, in USDC. Hard-capped at 10000.
environmentVariables.name: ANTSEED_MAX_DEPOSIT_USDC

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to require the local buyer to identify itself via /health. Recommended on shared dev boxes.
environmentVariables.name: ANTSEED_BUYER_STRICT

title: AntFeed
